description: This photograph shows an open, semi-natural landscape characterized by scattered trees and bushy vegetation. In the foreground and midground, several small trees or large shrubs with light green-yellow foliage are visible. The ground cover is sparse, appearing as dry, light brown soil or very short, dry grass. More mature, darker green trees are distributed across the midground and background under a clear, bright blue sky, suggesting a landscape consistent with the definition of "Transitional woodland and scrub." This environment aligns with EUNIS G5.6, describing early stages of woodland regrowth or newly colonizing woodland.
